query:
INSERT INTO lessons (courseId, title, content, lessonOrder, createdAt, updatedAt) 
SELECT id, CONCAT('Lesson 1: ', title, ' - Introduction'), 'Lesson content', 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code='BIB101'
UNION ALL SELECT id, CONCAT('Lesson 2: ', title, ' - Part 2'), 'Lesson content', 2, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code='BIB101'
UNION ALL SELECT id, CONCAT('Lesson 3: ', title, ' - Part 3'), 'Lesson content', 3, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code='BIB101'
UNION ALL SELECT id, CONCAT('Lesson 4: ', title, ' - Part 4'), 'Lesson content', 4, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code='BIB101'
UNION ALL SELECT id, CONCAT('Lesson 5: ', title, ' - Part 5'), 'Lesson content', 5, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code='BIB101'
UNION ALL SELECT id, CONCAT('Lesson 6: ', title, ' - Part 6'), 'Lesson content', 6, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code='BIB101'
UNION ALL SELECT id, CONCAT('Lesson 7: ', title, ' - Part 7'), 'Lesson content', 7, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code='BIB101'
UNION ALL SELECT id, CONCAT('Lesson 8: ', title, ' - Part 8'), 'Lesson content', 8, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code='BIB101'
UNION ALL SELECT id, CONCAT('Lesson 9: ', title, ' - Part 9'), 'Lesson content', 9, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code='BIB101'
UNION ALL SELECT id, CONCAT('Lesson 10: ', title, ' - Review'), 'Lesson content', 10, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code='BIB101';
